goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'arrive by 19:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
The train should leave on sunday and should arrive by 19:15
Make sure you get train ID, price, and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
